title: mysql db problem - new item creation impossible
author: omarie56
body_snippet:
Hi,

I used mysql to store mremote configuration file. Every thing work fine since a few months

I just notice that since a few days it is impossible for me to create new items. for exemple i want to duplicate and entry and i get this error message "cannot save connection file as ""! the data key was missing from the dictionary"

changes are not backup in mysql database

In preferences menu, when i chek my mysql connexion every thing is OK

My mremote version 1.77.2.4127
My Mysql vers...

iterations.description: New item creation is impossible for MySQL database users, indicating a critical bug in database interaction.

comments.author: omarie56
comments.snippet:
thanks, but you sql command is only for a new fresh mremonte install no ? What about for an existing tbscons table with content inside.

When i apply you sql command we get the mesage "#1050 - table 'tblCons' already exist"

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): New item creation is impossible for MySQL database users, indicating a critical bug in database interaction.
Approach: Investigate `MySqlDatabaseConnector.cs` and its usage in connection creation and saving workflows to identify and fix the underlying issue preventing new item creation in MySQL databases.
